response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 1 as "Haguruma" (KANA-BOON) based on lyrics and common anime song identification. 2. Identified song 2 as "Kokoro ga Tomaranai" (Jewelry) based on on-screen text "ココロが止まらない" and artist credit (Saegusa Uka/Jewelry). 3. Used the search string `"Haguruma" KANA-BOON Japanese and English lyrics` and `"ココロが止まらない" Jewelry Japanese and English lyrics`. 4. Extracted lyrics and matched them to the scenes. Note: The provided JSON schema asks for scenes; I will provide the main performances.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Usada Pekora and Akai Haato, featuring "Haguruma" (KANA-BOON) and "Kokoro ga Tomaranai" (Jewelry). There is an interval between the songs.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Akai Haato perform "Haguruma" on a stage with a slot-machine theme. Song title and artists are not explicitly on-screen in the traditional credits format, but are identifiable.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
咲かすか枯らすか現在 燃えるように陽が沈む
歯車が回る ラッパが鳴れば着火
様々 待った無しの物語 発車
バラバラ 滑車ガラガラ 真っ赤な過去が追いかける
道化師の笑み 仮面の裏側
どう消しても消えない 傷が痛んでも
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Will it bloom or will it wither? Now, as the sun sets as if burning
The gears turn. When the trumpet sounds, ignition
Various stories, no time to wait, departure
Scattered, pulleys rattling, a red past is chasing
The clown's smile, on the other side of the mask
How to erase it, the traces that won't disappear even if scarred?
